name: Orange Oriental Sesame Beef Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 envelope Good Seasons Oriental Sesame Salad Dressing Mix
1 pound boneless beef sirloin, cut into strips
5 cups assorted cut-up fresh vegetables OR
1 package (16 ounces) frozen mixed vegetables, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl or cruet, mix together the orange juice, soy sauce, salad dressing mix, oil, orange peel, and minced garlic as directed on the envelope.
2. Heat 1 tablespoon of the dressing mixture in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Add the beef strips to the skillet; cook and stir until fully cooked through.
4. Add the vegetables (fresh or thawed frozen) to the skillet and remaining dressing mixture.
5. Cook and stir until the vegetables are tender-crisp.
6. Serve over hot, cooked rice.
Prep Time: 15 minutes. Cooking Time: 10 minutes.
